fault_hypothesis: Line 67 uses `a or b` (disjunction) instead of `a and b` (conjunction), producing incorrect results when one mask is False while the other is True.

constraints.intent: After appending, the last element must equal the conjunction of a and b, not the disjunction.
At the end of each loop iteration, the appended value must be the logical AND of a and b.

spec.expr: all(__cbfl_result[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(mask_a)))

constraints.intent: The returned merged mask must be the element-wise AND of both input masks.

spec.expr: all(merged__1[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(merged__1)))

constraints.intent: Before returning merged, every element must equal the conjunction of the corresponding inputs.
